name: cookmate-ai
description: Cookmate AI — dish/budget -> Swiggy Instamart cart -> order. Channel-agnostic engine + CLI + server.

scripts.app: concurrently -k -n api,web -c yellow,green "bun run server" "bun run web"
scripts.test: bun src/core/budget.test.ts && bun src/core/cart.test.ts && bun src/validation/schemas.test.ts && bun src/engine/executor.test.ts
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun run format:check && bun run test
